source: runtime dispatch miss log — functions called indirectly (JALR / function pointer tables)
note: These functions have no static JAL callers and cannot be found by transitive discovery. They are reached at runtime via BIOS API dispatch tables (A0/B0/C0 vectors) or other indirect call mechanisms.
